utterances.text: Hi Priya, hi Marek, thanks for joining. The goal today is to walk through the proposal and answer any pricing questions before procurement gets involved.
Sounds good. We had a long internal discussion yesterday and there are three things we want to push back on.
First, the per-seat list price is about twenty percent higher than what we are paying our incumbent today. We need a clear story for our CFO on why this is worth it.
Understood. The short story is that our average customer in your segment sees twenty-five percent more pipeline per rep within six months. I'll send the case study.
Second concern: the AI Workflow add-on is a separate line item. We were assuming it was included, because that's how Gong packages their conversation AI.
We split it because not every customer uses it on day one. For your team size we can bundle it into the Enterprise tier with a reduced uplift, around twelve percent.
Twelve is still a lot. Procurement will benchmark against Gong and Salesloft and they will ask why we are paying for AI on top of the platform fee.
The honest answer is that our AI is genuinely tied into the workflow. Once Marek's SDRs use it for a week, it would be very hard to walk back. But I hear you on the optics.
Third concern: implementation services. Eighteen thousand for setup is steep. Can we reduce that scope?
Yes. If you nominate two strong admins from your side and commit to a four-week implementation, we can drop services to nine thousand and keep the same go-live date.
That feels more like it. Let's say nine thousand on services and a twelve percent uplift on Enterprise with AI included. What's the per-seat price then?
Effective per-seat would be about one hundred forty-six dollars per month on a three-year commit, paid annually.
Three years is a long commitment. Can we do two years with a renewal option?
We can do two years at one hundred fifty-two, or three years at one hundred forty-six. The savings on a three-year start to add up across forty seats.
Got it. We will discuss internally and come back by end of week. Can you put the two-year and three-year options side by side?
Will do, I'll send the updated proposal tomorrow morning.
Thanks, appreciate the flexibility on services.
